/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=11.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/cli/sanctsound_cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core_CompilationTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_core/juce_core.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_data_structures/juce_data_structures.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_events/juce_events.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_basics/juce_audio_basics.mm.o CMakeFiles/sanctsound_cli.dir/external/JUCE/modules/juce_audio_formats/juce_audio_formats.mm.o -o sanctsound_cli  libsanctsound_core.a -framework Cocoa -framework Foundation -framework IOKit -framework Security -framework Accelerate -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreMIDI -framework QuartzCore -framework AudioToolbox
